task: Use the calculator to compute the value of the definite integral of x^2 from 0 to 3. Note: if the calculator does not support symbolic integration, fall back to the analytical solution (integral of x^2 dx = x^3/3) and compute (3^3/3) - (0^3/3) directly.
notes: Expected failure: most calculator tools do not support symbolic integration. Expected recovery: apply the analytical formula and compute the numeric difference. Tests mathematical reasoning under tool limitations.
